titleEn: South Korea: Introducing AI into smart farm platform
titleZh: 韩国乐天创新将AI引入智慧农场平台
summaryZh: 韩国乐天创新宣布为其智慧农场平台“城市蓝农场”引入AI技术，利用大语言模型开发“智慧农场代理”，为农民提供定制化指导，帮助解决运营问题、提高决策效率。该平台还整合了市场行情分析和视觉AI技术，用于预测作物生长与病虫害，未来将以SaaS形式扩展服务，降低智慧农业门槛。
translationZh:
乐天创新宣布，将把人工智能（AI）技术引入其智慧农场平台“城市蓝农场”，以引领智慧农业市场，并加速农业的人工智能转型（AX）。

据乐天创新介绍，利用大语言模型（LLM）技术开发的“智慧农场代理”可作为农民的定制化导师。该公司解释称，该代理能直观地指导最新的智慧农场趋势以及作物种植所需的专业诀窍，使缺乏经验的新手农民也能轻松获取专业知识。

这使得农民能够实时解决运营中出现的各种问题，并基于数据做出快速准确的决策。预计这将通过减少不必要的试错来提高农场管理效率，同时带来诸如最大化作物生产力和降低运营成本等实际成果。

此外，该平台还提供作物市场价格分析数据，帮助农民制定更高效的种植和运营策略。特别值得一提的是，乐天创新此前已开发了视觉AI技术，通过预测作物生长状态和病虫害来提高生产力。该公司计划未来进一步推进这些基于AI的代理技术，以软件即服务（SaaS）的形式扩展服务领域。通过此举，计划建立一个即使不具备智慧农场专业知识的人也能轻松运营农场的环境。
featuredReason: 该新闻展示了AI大语言模型在智慧农业中的具体落地应用，尤其是针对新手农民的定制化指导功能，具有较高的创新性和行业参考价值。虽然内容受广告拦截干扰，但核心信息清晰，适合关注智慧农业技术趋势的读者。

 Tuesday, 21 July 2026
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 South Korea: Introducing AI into smart farm platform

 

 
 Lotte Innovate announced that it will introduce artificial intelligence (AI) technology to its smart farm platform "Blue Farm in the City" to lead the smart agricultural market and accelerate the artificial intelligence transformation (AX) of agriculture.

 According to Lotte Innovate, the "Smart Farm Agent" developed using Large Language Model (LLM) technology serves as a customized mentor for farmers. The company explains that it intuitively guides the latest smart farm trends and specialized know-how essential for crop cultivation so that inexperienced novice farmers can easily access their expertise.

 This enables farmers to solve various problems arising from their operations in real time and make quick and accurate decisions based on data. This is expected to increase the efficiency of farm management by reducing unnecessary trial and error, while leading to practical results such as maximizing crop productivity and reducing operating costs.

 In addition, it also provides data on crop market price analysis to help farmers establish more efficient cultivation and operation strategies. In particular, Lotte Innovate has previously developed Vision AI technology to increase productivity by predicting the growth status of crops and predicting diseases and pests. The company plans to further advance these AI-based agent technologies in the future to expand the service area in the form of software as a service (SaaS). Through this, the plan is to establish an environment in which anyone who does not have expertise in smart farms can easily operate a farm.

 Read more at Maeil Business
